reviews.comment:
En el Full preparan un riquísimo café y la atención es súper cordial.
Tuve la mala suerte de volcarme el café entero encima, pero enseguida me ayudaron a limpiar y me prepararon otro café.
Muy agradecido con todo el personal.

(Translated by Google)
At Full, they make delicious coffee and the service is incredibly friendly.
I had the misfortune of spilling my entire cup of coffee on myself, but they immediately helped me clean it up and made me another one. I'm very grateful to all the staff.

reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio, me entregaron el auto con manchas diciéndome que lo tenía que repintar, una estupidez, ya que con el dedo frotando salían perfectamente las manchas de algúnas hojas de árbol.  no vuelvo nunca más. Soy socia del Aca y creo me merezco una mejor atención !!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service! They returned my car with stains and told me I had to repaint it—a stupid idea, since the stains from some leaves came off perfectly with just a finger rub. I'm never going back. I'm a member of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) and I think I deserve better service!

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, impecable todo!
Si no es el mejor ACA que conozco, la pega en el poste! Tuve un problema con un cobro por la App de YPF y me llamaron y me solucionaron todo (Marcelo un genio!).
Deja de cargar nafta en ese lugar roñoso donde cargas siempre y anda al ACA de Flores!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, everything was impeccable!
If it's not the best ACA I know, it's definitely one of the best! I had a problem with a charge through the YPF app, and they called me and sorted everything out (Marcelo is a genius!). Stop filling up at that shabby place you always do and go to the ACA in Flores!!
